marketStatus.upToDate: Market data is up to date

dashboard.noAssetsYet: No assets yet. Add your first asset from the sidebar.
dashboard.noNotes: No portfolio notes yet. Add notes for rebalancing decisions, watchlist items, or strategy updates.
dashboard.noTags: No tags yet. Add tags to assets or notes to make the portfolio easier to scan.
dashboard.marketDataSetupBodyNoKeysNoHoldings: Your market API keys are empty. Set them now so live prices work as soon as you add crypto or stock holdings.
dashboard.marketDataSetupBodyNoKeys: Some crypto/stock prices are unavailable. Add your API keys in Settings to enable live pricing.
dashboard.marketDataSetupBodyWithKeys: Some crypto/stock prices are unavailable. Open Settings to test or update your provider keys.
dashboard.onboardingTitle: How do you want to start?
dashboard.onboardingSubtitle: Pick a setup path. You can switch anytime in Account settings.
dashboard.onboardingDemoBody: Loads a full demo portfolio across all sections, with hardcoded market prices and fiat rates so everything works without API keys.
dashboard.onboardingManualBody: Start empty and add your own assets. You can add market API keys later in Account settings.
dashboard.manualAccountReady: Your account is ready. Start adding assets from the sidebar, then open Market settings when you want live prices.
dashboard.demoAccountReady: Test account is ready. Demo data was imported into all sections and uses hardcoded market prices.
dashboard.demoAccountBlocked: Demo account import is available only for empty accounts.
dashboard.demoAccountError: Demo account import failed. Please reload the app and try again.
dashboard.demoModeBadgeBody: Crypto/stock prices and fiat rates are currently hardcoded for exploration.
dashboard.title: Title
dashboard.noteSaveError: Unable to save note. Please check the fields and try again.

crypto.subtitle: Live CoinGecko prices · refresh every 10 min
crypto.emptySubtitle: Add your first holding using the button above

savings.subtitle: Savings, term deposits and cash reserves

history.autoSnapshot: Weekly snapshot taken automatically (last was {days} days ago)
history.title: History & Charts
history.subtitle: Net worth over time · {count} snapshots · auto-snapshot weekly
history.takeAtLeastTwo: Take at least 2 snapshots to see charts.
history.takeSnapshotHint: Click “Take Snapshot” to record today's values.
history.noCashflow: No cashflow entries yet. Log contributions and withdrawals so net worth changes can be interpreted against actual capital movement.
history.cashflowSaveError: Unable to save cashflow entry. Please check the fields and try again.

settings.title: Account
settings.subtitle: Seed phrase · Sync relay · Cross-device access
settings.marketKeysDescription: New users can add their own provider keys here. Keys are stored locally in your browser and sent only with your price requests.
settings.demoModeActiveBody: Market prices currently use hardcoded demo data. Add your own keys and save to switch back to live providers.
settings.demoModeDisabled: Demo mode disabled. Price requests will use live providers and your local keys.
settings.yahooApiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your RapidAPI key for Yahoo endpoint
settings.marketKeysHint: Tip: click the crypto/stock status chips in the sidebar to jump back here quickly.
settings.marketKeysCleared: Market API keys removed from this browser.
settings.marketTestAllOk: CoinGecko and Stocks price endpoints responded successfully.
settings.marketTestCryptoFailed: Stock prices work, but CoinGecko request failed. Check your CoinGecko key.
settings.marketTestStocksFailed: CoinGecko works, but stock prices failed. Check your Yahoo/RapidAPI key.
settings.marketTestFailed: Both market requests failed. Re-check keys and provider limits.
settings.marketKeyTransferDescription: Export/import your market keys as an encrypted JSON bundle. Use your current seed phrase or a custom passphrase.
settings.marketKeyTransferPassphrasePlaceholder: Leave blank to use your current seed phrase
settings.marketKeyTransferHint: The exported bundle is AES-GCM encrypted and can be safely moved between devices.
settings.marketKeyTransferPassphraseRequired: Passphrase is required for encrypted transfer.
settings.marketKeyTransferImported: Encrypted bundle imported. Keys are now available in this browser.
settings.marketKeyTransferImportFailed: Encrypted bundle import failed. Check passphrase and file format.
settings.seedDescription: This is your account identity. Keep it secret and safe. Use it to restore access on another device.
settings.evoluOnboardingDescription: Your account is tied to a seed phrase, not to an email. This is what enables secure sync between devices.
settings.evoluOnboardingStep1: Open and save your seed phrase below. It is the key to your account.
settings.evoluOnboardingStep2: On another device, open the app and choose Restore from Seed.
settings.evoluOnboardingStep3: Enter the same seed phrase and your encrypted data will sync via Evolu relay.
settings.generateConfirm: Generate a new seed phrase? This will replace your current account. All unsynced data may be lost.
settings.seedInvalid: Invalid seed phrase. Please check and try again.
settings.seedAlreadyActive: This seed phrase is already active.
settings.restoreFailed: Failed to restore. Please try again.
settings.syncDescription: Data syncs end-to-end encrypted via a WebSocket relay. The default public relay is free. You can self-host your own.
settings.relayUrlInvalid: Relay URL must start with ws:// or wss://
settings.syncHint: How it works: Your data is stored locally in the browser (IndexedDB). The relay server only stores encrypted chunks and cannot read your data. Open this app with the same seed phrase on another device to sync.
settings.backupDescription: Export your local Evolu data to JSON or import a previous backup. Import replaces the current local dataset and then reloads the app.
settings.backupImportedWarnings: Backup imported with warnings. {issues} Reloading app…
settings.importConfirm:
Import backup and replace current local data?

{summary}{warnings}
settings.snapshotAutomationDescription: Create one snapshot per calendar day when the app opens on a new day.
settings.snapshotAutomationToggle: Enable daily snapshot on app open / day change
settings.portfolioNotesDescription: Controls whether the Portfolio Notes section appears on dashboard.
settings.portfolioNotesEnabledHint: Portfolio Notes section is active on dashboard.
settings.portfolioNotesDisabledHint: Portfolio Notes section is off and hidden from dashboard.
settings.tagCloudDescription: Controls whether the Tag Cloud section appears on dashboard.
settings.tagCloudEnabledHint: Tag Cloud section is active on dashboard.
settings.tagCloudDisabledHint: Tag Cloud section is off and hidden from dashboard.
settings.targetAllocationDescription: Set your target weights by asset class. Dashboard compares these targets against current portfolio composition.
settings.targetAllocationToggle: Enable Target vs Actual Allocation feature
settings.targetAllocationDisabledHint: Detailed target allocation settings stay hidden until you enable this feature.

marketSettings.title: Settings
marketSettings.subtitle: Market data keys for crypto and stock prices
marketSettings.keysDescription: New users can add their own provider keys here. Keys are stored locally in your browser and sent only with your price requests.
marketSettings.yahooApiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your RapidAPI key for Yahoo endpoint
marketSettings.keysHint: Tip: click the crypto/stock status chips in the sidebar to jump back here quickly.
marketSettings.keysCleared: Market API keys removed from this browser.
marketSettings.testAllOk: CoinGecko and Stocks price endpoints responded successfully.
marketSettings.testCryptoFailed: Stock prices work, but CoinGecko request failed. Check your CoinGecko key.
marketSettings.testStocksFailed: CoinGecko works, but stock prices failed. Check your Yahoo/RapidAPI key.
marketSettings.testFailed: Both market requests failed. Re-check keys and provider limits.
marketSettings.transferDescription: Export/import your market keys as an encrypted JSON bundle. Use your current seed phrase or a custom passphrase.
marketSettings.transferPassphrasePlaceholder: Leave blank to use your current seed phrase
marketSettings.transferHint: The exported bundle is AES-GCM encrypted and can be safely moved between devices.
marketSettings.transferPassphraseRequired: Passphrase is required for encrypted transfer.
marketSettings.transferImported: Encrypted bundle imported. Keys are now available in this browser.
marketSettings.transferImportFailed: Encrypted bundle import failed. Check passphrase and file format.
